column1: # 3D range references: @SUM(A:B3..C:B3) sums one cell on each of
# sheets A, B, and C.  l123-parse translates the sheet-qualified range
# to a comma-separated list of per-sheet references that IronCalc
# Add two more sheets via /WIS A; each leaves pointer on current sheet.
# /WIS A again while on B — inserts sheet C after B.
# Back to A:A1, enter the 3D sum in A:C3.
